message:
feat(search): add pluggable FusionBackend with optional frankensearch RRF integration

Introduce a FusionBackend enum that allows the hybrid search ranking
pipeline to dispatch RRF fusion to either the existing in-tree
weighted implementation (Legacy) or the frankensearch crate's RRF
(feature-gated behind "frankensearch"). The backend is selectable at
runtime via the FT_SEARCH_FUSION_BACKEND environment variable.

Key changes:
- Add FusionBackend enum (Legacy, FrankenSearchRrf) with from_env()
  constructor that parses FT_SEARCH_FUSION_BACKEND env var
- Implement rrf_fuse_with_frankensearch() that adapts frankenterm's
  (u64, f32) hit tuples into frankensearch ScoredResult/VectorHit
  types and calls frankensearch::rrf_fuse()
- Extend HybridSearchService with fusion_backend field and
  with_fusion_backend() builder method
- Update HybridSearchService::fuse() to dispatch to the correct
  backend, with automatic fallback to weighted RRF when non-unit
  weights are used with the frankensearch backend (since it only
  supports unweighted fusion currently)
- Add comprehensive tests: backend trait derive coverage,
  builder setter, cross-validation that frankensearch and legacy
  backends produce identical top-k ordering for unit weights,
  and verification that non-unit weights trigger fallback
- Apply rustfmt import reordering across search modules
  (chunk_vector_store, chunking, daemon/server, hash_embedder, mod)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
